labrador-retriever: The sturdy, well-balanced ██████████████ can, depending on the sex, stand from 21.5 to 24.5 inches at the shoulder and weigh between 55 to 80 pounds. The dense, hard coat comes in yellow, black, and a luscious chocolate.
golden-retriever: The ██████████████ is a sturdy, muscular dog of medium size, famous for the dense, lustrous coat of gold that gives the breed its name. The broad head, with its friendly and intelligent eyes, short ears, and straight muzzle, is a breed hallmark.
german-shepherd: ██████████████ Dogs can stand as high as 26 inches at the shoulder and, when viewed in outline, presents a picture of smooth, graceful curves rather than angles.
french-bulldog: The ██████████████ resembles a ███████ in miniature, except for the large, erect “bat ears” that are the breed’s trademark feature. The head is large and square, with heavy wrinkles rolled above the extremely short nose.
bulldog: You can’t mistake a ███████ for any other breed. The loose skin of the head, furrowed brow, pushed-in nose, small ears, undershot jaw with hanging chops on either side, and the distinctive rolling gait all practically scream “I’m a ███████!
poodle: ██████ come in three size varieties: Standards should be more than 15 inches tall at the shoulder; Miniatures are 15 inches or under; Toys stand no more than 10 inches.
beagle: There are two ██████ varieties: those standing under 13 inches at the shoulder, and those between 13 and 15 inches. Both varieties are sturdy, solid, and “big for their inches,” as dog folks say.
rottweiler: A male ██████████ will stand anywhere from 24 to 27 muscular inches at the shoulder; females run a bit smaller and lighter. The glistening, short black coat with smart rust markings add to the picture of imposing strength.
dachshund: The word “icon” is terribly overworked, but the █████████—with his unmistakable long-backed body, little legs, and big personality—is truly an icon of purebred dogdom.
pembroke-welsh-corgi: At 10 to 12 inches at the shoulder and 27 to 30 pounds, a well-built male ████████ presents a big dog in a small package. Short but powerful legs, muscular thighs, and a deep chest equip him for a hard day’s work.
australian-shepherd: The ██████████████, the cowboy’s herding dog of choice, is a medium-sized worker with a keen, penetrating gaze in the eye. ██████ coats offer different looks, including merle (a mottled pattern with contrasting shades of blue or red).
yorkshire-terrier: The ██████████████ is a compact, toy-size ███████ of no more than seven pounds whose crowning glory is a floor-length, silky coat of steel blue and a rich golden tan.
boxer: A well-made █████ in peak condition is an awesome sight. A male can stand as high as 25 inches at the shoulder; females run smaller. Their muscles ripple beneath a short, tight-fitting coat.
siberian-husky: The graceful, medium-sized ██████████████’s almond-shaped eyes can be either brown or blue—and sometimes one of each—and convey a keen but amiable and even mischievous expression.
cavalier-king-charles-spaniel: The ████████’s all-around beauty, regal grace, and even temper mark him as one of dogdom’s noblemen. A toy ███████ no more than 13 inches high, the ████████ draws you in with his face: The sweet, gentle, melting expression emanating from large, round eyes is a breed hallmark.
doberman-pinscher: ████████ are compactly-built dogs—muscular, fast, and powerful—standing between 24 to 28 inches at the shoulder. The body is sleek but substantial, and is covered with a glistening coat of black, blue, red, or fawn, with rust markings.
great-dane: As tall as 32 inches at the shoulder, ████ tower over most other dogs—and when standing on their hind legs, they are taller than most people. These powerful giants are the picture of elegance and balance, with the smooth and easy stride of born noblemen.
miniature-schnauzer: Stocky, robust little dogs standing 12 to 14 inches, ██████████████ were bred down from their larger cousins, Standard █████████. The bushy beard and eyebrows give Minis a charming, human-like expression.
shih-tzu: ████████ (pronounced in the West “sheed-zoo” or “sheet-su”; the Chinese say “sher-zer”), weighing between 9 to 16 pounds, and standing between 8 and 11 inches, are surprisingly solid for dogs their size.
boston-terrier: ██████████████ are compact, short-tailed, well-balanced little dogs weighing no more than 25 pounds. The stylish “tuxedo” coat can be white and either black, brindle, or seal (black with a red cast when viewed in sun or bright light).
bernese-mountain-dog: The ██████████████ is a large, sturdy worker who can stand over 27 inches at the shoulder. The thick, silky, and moderately long coat is tricolored: jet black, clear white, and rust.
pomeranian: The ██████████ combines a tiny body (no more than seven pounds) and a commanding big-dog demeanor. The abundant double coat, with its frill extending over the chest and shoulders, comes in almost two dozen colors, and various patterns and markings, but is most commonly seen in orange or red.
border-collie: ██████ are athletic, medium-sized herders standing 18 to 22 inches at the shoulder. The overall look is that of a muscular but nimble worker unspoiled by passing fads.
shetland-sheepdog: The ██████████████ is a small, active, and agile herding dog standing between 13 and 16 inches at the shoulder. The long coat is harsh and straight, with a dense undercoat, and comes in black, blue merle, and sable, with white markings.
maltese: ███████ are affectionate toy dogs weighing less than seven pounds, covered by a long, straight, silky coat. Beneath the all-white mantle is a compact body moving with a smooth and effortless gait.
chihuahua: The █████████ is a balanced, graceful dog of terrier-like demeanor, weighing no more than 6 pounds. The rounded “apple” head is a breed hallmark. The erect ears and full, luminous eyes are acutely expressive.
basset-hound: The ████████████ stands no higher than 14 inches at the shoulder but, with his remarkably heavy bone, powerful little legs, and massive paws, he possesses big-dog strength and stamina.
mastiff: For the uninitiated, a face-to-face encounter with these black-masked giants can be startling. A male stands at least 30 inches at the shoulder and can outweigh many a full-grown man.
cocker-spaniel: Those big, dark eyes; that sweet expression; those long, lush ears that practically demand to be touched—no wonder the ██████ spent years as America’s most popular breed.
weimaraner: Instantly recognized by a distinctive silvery-gray coat, male ██████████ stand 25 to 27 inches at the shoulder, and females 23 to 25 inches. A properly bred ██████████ will be solid colored, with maybe a small white spot on the chest.
bichon-frise: A good-size ██████ will stand a shade under a foot tall at the shoulder. The breed’s glory is a white hypoallergenic coat, plush and velvety to the touch, featuring rounded head hair that sets off the large, dark eyes and black leathers of the nose and lips.
brittany-spaniel: ████████ are smaller than setters but leggier than ███████, standing about 20 inches at the shoulder. Their beautiful, boldly patterned coat comes in combinations of white and vivid orange and liver (reddish-brown).
bull-terrier: ████████████ are robust, big-boned ███████ who move with a jaunty stride suggesting agility and power. The breed’s hallmark is a long, egg-shaped head with erect and pointed ears, and small, triangular eyes that glisten with good humor.
dalmatian: The █████████’s delightful, eye-catching spots of black or liver adorn one of the most distinctive coats in the animal kingdom. Beneath the spots is a graceful, elegantly proportioned trotting dog standing between 19 and 23 inches at the shoulder.
irish-setter: The ████████████ has been described by its partisans as the most beautiful of dog breeds. Standing more than two feet at the shoulder, with a substantial yet elegant build, the █████ is famed for a brilliant coat of mahogany or chestnut.
samoyed: ███████, the smiling sledge dogs, were bred for hard work in the world’s coldest locales. In the Siberian town of Oymyakon, for instance, temperatures of minus-60 degrees are common.
akita: █████ are burly, heavy-boned spitz-type dogs of imposing stature. Standing 24 to 28 inches at the shoulder, █████ have a dense coat that comes in several colors, including white.
basenji: ███████ are small, graceful hounds standing 16 or 17 inches at the shoulder. They are recognizable by their glistening short coat, tightly curled tail, and wrinkled forehead and expressive almond-shaped eyes that convey a variety of subtle, humanlike emotions.
bloodhound: ██████████ are large, substantial dogs standing 23 to 27 inches at the shoulder and weighing up to 110 pounds. Their most famous features are a long, wrinkled face with loose skin; huge, drooping ears; and warm, deep-set eyes that complete an expression of solemn dignity.
chow-chow: ████ are powerful, compactly built dogs standing as high as 20 inches at the shoulder. Their distinctive traits include a lion’s-mane ruff around the head and shoulders; a blue-black tongue; deep-set almond eyes that add to a scowling, snobbish expression; and a stiff-legged gait.
greyhound: █████████ are the essence of the dog breeder’s credo “Form follows function.” From the narrow, aerodynamic skull to the shock-absorbing pads of the feet, █████████ are perfectly constructed for high-speed pursuit.
havanese: Distinctive features of the ████████ include a curled-over tail and a gorgeous silky coat, which comes in a variety of colors. Some owners enjoy cording the coat, in the manner of a Puli, and others clip it short to reduce grooming time.
italian-greyhound: IGs are █████████ in miniature—more slender, but a █████████’s equal in grace and elegance. Standing ideally 13 to 15 inches at the shoulder, they present the sleek, curving lines common to all coursing hounds.
jack-russell-terrier: These jaunty little fellows pack lots of personality into a compact, rectangular body standing 10 to 12 inches at the shoulder. Their dark, almond-shaped eyes and mobile V-shaped ears bring out the keenly intelligent expression—an endearing hallmark of the breed.
papillon: A tiny dog, measuring 8 to 11 inches at the shoulder, you can still spot a ████████ a block away thanks to the large, wing-shaped ears that give the breed its name (“████████” is French for “butterfly”).
pug: The ███’s motto is the Latin phrase “multum in parvo” (a lot in a little)—an apt description of this small but muscular breed. They come in three colors: silver or apricot-fawn with a black face mask, or all black.
vizsla: The ██████ is easily recognized by his sleek golden-rust coat. They can stand between 21 to 24 inches at the shoulder and are the picture of a lean, light-footed hunter’s companion.
whippet: At somewhere between 18 and 22 inches at the shoulder, the ███████ looks like a Greyhound, but smaller. The ███████ exhibits the classic “inverted S” lines of the sighthound.
wire-fox-terrier: The ██████████████, 16 to 18 pounds of coiled energy, is a sturdy, symmetrical, short-backed hunter with fire and intelligence shining in its dark, round eyes.
german-shorthaired-pointer: Male ██████████████ stand between 23 and 25 inches at the shoulder and weigh anywhere from 55 to 70 pounds; females run smaller. The coat is solid liver (a reddish brown), or liver and white in distinctive patterns.
airedale-terrier: The ██████████████ is the largest of all ███████ breeds. Males stand about 23 inches at the shoulder, females a little less. The dense, wiry coat is tan with black markings.
afghan-hound: The ████████████ is an ancient breed, his whole appearance one of dignity and aloofness – his eyes gazing into the distance as if in memory of ages past. An intelligent and independent mind, his whole appearance one of dignity and style.
alaskan-malamute: The ██████████████ stands 23 to 25 inches at the shoulder and weighs 75 to 85 pounds. Everything about Mals suggests their origin as an arctic sled dog: The heavy bone, deep chest, powerful shoulders, and dense, weatherproof coat all scream, “I work hard for a living!
australian-cattle-dog: Standing between 17 to 20 inches at the shoulder, the ██████████████ is a sturdy, hard-muscled herder of strength and agility. The ACD is born with a white coat that turns blue-gray or red.
belgian-malinois: ██████████████ are squarely built, proud, and alert herders standing 22 to 26 inches. Strong and well-muscled, but more elegant than bulky, there’s an honest, no-frills look about them, as befit dogs built to work hard for their feed.
borzoi: ██████ are large, elegant sighthounds. A mature male stands at least 28 inches at the shoulder and weighs 75 to 105 pounds. Females will be smaller. Beneath the luxurious silky coat, ██████ construction follows the ancient Greyhound template.
cairn-terrier: The █████’s unique qualities, called “Cairnishness,” include a short, wide head and a free-moving, short-legged body that exudes strength but not heaviness, topping out at about 10 inches high and about 15 inches long.
cardigan-welsh-corgi: Long, low-set dogs with sturdy bone, short legs, and a deep chest, ████████ are powerful workers of deceptive speed and grace. Cardis can weigh anywhere from 25 to 34 pounds, with females at the lower end of the scale.
chesapeake-bay-retriever: ████████ are strong, powerfully built gundogs standing anywhere from 21 to 26 inches at the shoulder. A male can weigh up to 80 pounds. The distinctive breed trait is a wavy coat that is oily to the touch.
english-setter: ██████████████ are elegant but solid dogs of beauty and charm. The word “belton,” unique to the breed, describes the speckled coat patterns of colors that sound good enough to eat: liver, lemon, and orange among them.
english-springer-spaniel: Built for long days in the field, ██████████████ are tough, muscular hunters standing 19 to 20 inches at the shoulder and weighing between 40 and 50 pounds.
giant-schnauzer: A well-bred ██████████████ closely resembles the Standard █████████—only bigger. As their name suggests, █████ are imposing.A male might stand as high as 27.5 inches at the shoulder and weigh 95 pounds.
great-pyrenees: Frequently described as “majestic,” Pyrs are big, immensely strong mountain dogs standing as high as 32 inches at the shoulder and often tipping the scales at more than 100 pounds.
irish-wolfhound: The amiable ██████████████ is an immense, muscular hound gracefully built along classic Greyhound lines, capable of great speed at the gallop. A male might stand nearly 3 feet at the shoulder and weigh up to 180 pounds.
keeshond: These square, sturdy companions descend from the same ancient stock as other spitz types, such as Pomeranians and Samoyeds. Typically “spitzy,” Keeshonden have a foxy face, pointed ears, an abundant coat, and a plumed tail carried high over the back.
komondor: Our Hungarian-language tip of the day: The plural of ████████ is Komondorok. Now, let’s take a look at the dog. What we see is a large and powerful guardian covered in profuse white cords.
leonberger: A huge and powerful dog, yes, but the ██████████ is also known for his aristocratic grace and elegance. A male can stand over 31 inches at the shoulder and weigh as much as a full-grown human.
lhasa-apso: Standing less than a foot high at the shoulder, █████ are small but hardy dogs of aristocratic bearing. They’re famous for a floor-length, flat-hanging coat, parted in the middle and draping each side of the body.
miniature-pinscher: Min Pins are sturdy, compact dogs standing no more than 12.5 inches at the shoulder. The smooth, shiny coat comes in two shades of solid red, or chocolate-and-rust or black-and-rust.
newfoundland: A male ████████████ can weigh up to 150 pounds and stand 28 inches at the shoulder; females typically go 100 to 120 pounds. The Newf head is majestic, the expression soft and soulful.
norwegian-elkhound: ██████████████ are hardy, short-bodied dogs standing about 20 inches at the shoulder. They have a dense silver-gray coat and a tail curling tightly over the back.
otterhound: These big, bouncy hounds were ideally suited for otter hunting. OHs are built to be expert swimmers, from the top of their rough, waterproof coat to the bottom of their big webbed feet.
pekingese: █████████ are compact, stocky toy dogs weighing up to 14 pounds. The coat is longest at the neck and shoulders, giving Pekes their famous “lion’s mane.” Coats come in various reds, from a golden-red to darker shades.
rhodesian-ridgeback: Beneath the █████████’s trademark ridge is a whole lot of hound: █████████ are fast and powerful athletes who can weigh between 70 and 85 pounds, and oftentimes more.
rough-collie: The ██████ is a large but lithe herder standing anywhere from 22 to 26 inches tall. The █████ variety boasts one of the canine kingdom’s most impressively showy coats; the smooth coat’s charms are subtler but no less satisfying.
saluki: The beauty of ██████ has been a thing of wonder for thousands of years. They’re slim and leggy, but very strong and perfectly balanced, like a great athlete or dancer.
shar-pei: The compact, medium-sized Chinese ████████ is an amalgam of odd physical traits: a broad “hippopotamus” muzzle; a blue-black tongue; small, sunken eyes with a scowling expression; tiny triangular ears; abundant folds of loose skin about the head, neck, and shoulders; the tapered high-set tail—all blanketed by a harsh,…
shiba-inu: Brought to America from Japan as recently as 60 years ago, █████ are growing in popularity in the West and are already the most popular breed in their homeland.
scottish-terrier: The well-known Scottie silhouette is that of a short-legged but substantial ███████ with distinctive furnishings at the beard, legs, and lower body. The wiry topcoat and soft, dense undercoat coat can be black, wheaten yellow, or a brindle-stripe pattern.
soft-coated-wheaten-terrier: The hallmark of these merry extroverts, and what sets them apart from other ███████, is the silky, gently waving coat. It runs from a pale beige to a shimmering gold, recalling the color of ripening wheat.
st-bernard: Not ranked particularly high in AKC registrations, this genial giant is nonetheless among the world’s most famous and beloved breeds. The Saint’s written standard abounds with phrases like “very powerful,” “extraordinarily muscular,” “imposing,” and “massive.
staffordshire-bull-terrier: At 14 to 16 inches, ██████████████ do not stand particularly tall. But, weighing anywhere between 24 to 38 pounds, they pour a gallon of dog into a quart-size container.
west-highland-white-terrier: Standing 10 to 11 inches at the shoulder, with dark piercing eyes, compact body, and a carrot-shaped tail wagging with delight, the ██████’s looks are irresistible.
xoloitzcuintli: The ██████████████ (show-low-eats-queen-tlee) comes in three sizes: toy, miniature, and standard, and two varieties: hairless and coated. The hairless has tough, smooth, close-fitting skin.
bedlington-terrier: ██████████ are lithe, energetic Englishmen. The crisp, curly coat; arched back; tasseled ears; scimitar-shaped tail; and fleecy, pear-shaped head are identifying features of this one-of-a-kind breed.
border-terrier: ██████████████, standing from 11 to 16 inches at the shoulder, are easy to recognize among other small ███████ by their unique head shape—the breed has an “otter head,” as fanciers say.
irish-terrier: █████████████ are the prototype of a long-legged ███████. Standing about 18 inches at the shoulder, they’re sturdy but lithe and graceful. Every line of the body is eye-catching, and the overall picture is beautifully balanced.
kerry-blue-terrier: Of course, we begin with the show-stopping coat that turns heads wherever Kerries go. It comes in shades of ████—from a deep slate to a light ████-gray—and is so soft that it’s as pleasing to the touch as it is to the eye.
lakeland-terrier: Square and sturdy ████████, standing less than 15 inches at the shoulder and weighing about 17 pounds, are small dogs. But don’t tell them that. With their cock-of-the-walk swagger, ████████ personify the old dog-lover’s cliché “a big dog in a small package.
norfolk-terrier: ██████████████ are among the smallest working ███████, standing no higher than 10 inches at the shoulder. The coat is hard, wiry, and straight. They share many traits with their close cousins, Norwich ███████.
norwich-terrier: Standing no more than 10 inches at the shoulder and weighing about 12 pounds, ███████ are among the smallest working ███████. Beneath the hard, wiry coat is a stocky, substantial dog.
silky-terrier: Small but not fragile, feisty but not yappy, pretty but not sculpted, █████ are 10-inch-tall dynamos animated by curiosity and high spirits. The glorious blue-and-tan coat is straight and glossy, and it feels and behaves much like human hair.
welsh-terrier: Sturdy, compact, and rugged, with a tight-fitting black-and-tan coat and a rectangular head featuring folded ears and a jaunty beard, █████ are constructed along the classic lines of Britain’s long-legged ███████.
dandie-dinmont-terrier: Physical hallmarks of the ██████████████ include a large head covered with profuse, silky white hair; long, hanging ears tipped with feathering and coming almost to a point; big, round eyes full of brightness and expression; and a long, low torso and short legs.
clumber-spaniel: ██████████████ are powerful bird dogs of heavy bone, built long and low, with a massive head. They stand 17 to 20 inches; a small female might be 55 pounds, and a large male could go 85 pounds.
irish-water-spaniel: Standing 21 to 24 inches at the shoulder and weighing 55 to 65 pounds, the ██████████████ straddles the line between “medium” and “large” dogs on our scale of size.
welsh-springer-spaniel: Standing between 17 and 19 inches at the shoulder, Welshies are described by their fans as being of “handy size”: bigger and stronger than Cocker ███████ but smaller than English ████████.
sussex-spaniel: ██████ are long, low-built bird dogs of great strength and endurance. Topping out at just 15 inches tall at the shoulder, ██████ are nonetheless described as “massive,” with a deep chest and heavy bone.
curly-coated-retriever: The ██████████████’s tight, crisp curls of either black or liver serve as waterproof and thorn-resistant all-weather gear for work in thick bramble and icy lakes.
flat-coated-retriever: The ██████████████’s eponymous flat-lying coat comes in lustrous black or liver, with feathering at the legs and tail. A distinctive breed hallmark is the long head—unique among █████████—which projects a smart and kindly expression.
gordon-setter: ██████ are the largest and most substantial of the ██████—a big male might stand 27 inches at the shoulder and weigh 80 pounds. The stunning coat is a glistening black, with tan markings and long hair on the ears, belly, legs, chest, and tail.
ibizan-hound: ██████ are lithe and leggy visitors from the dawn of civilization. Art history students will recognize the elongated head, with its large erect ears, as a familiar motif of ancient Egypt.
scottish-deerhound: Stand back: You need a little distance to fully appreciate the majesty of this ancient beast. In silhouette we see a noble coursing hound struck from the classic Greyhound template.
old-english-sheepdog: Beneath the ██████████████’s profuse double coat is a muscular and compact drover, with plenty of bone and a big rump, standing 21 or 22 inches at the shoulder.
belgian-tervuren: The ██████████████ is characterized by a straight and abundant coat, an elegant but muscular frame, a proudly carried head, an alert and intelligent demeanor, and an insatiable work drive.
belgian-groenendael: The stirring silhouette of a ███████ Sheepdog conveys both elegance and muscular determination. A handsome feature of the breed is the exceedingly proud carriage of the head and neck.
bouvier-des-flandres: Standing as high as 27.5 inches, with heavy bone and powerful muscles beneath a weatherproof coat, and an impressive head accented by beard and mustache, ███████ can do anything that needs doing in a barnyard or pasture except milk the cows.
briard: ██████ are herders known for a wavy coat of either gray, tawny, or black, and an impressive head topped by a peek-a-boo hairdo parted naturally in the middle. A luxurious beard and eyebrows accentuate an expression described as “frank and questioning.
appenzeller-mountain-dog: The ███████████ Sennenhund is also known as the ██████████████ or Appenzell Cattle Dog. He is lively, high-spirited, self-assured, reliable, and fearless.
entlebucher-mountain-dog: ███████████ (ENT-leh-boo-cur) ████████ Dogs are muscular, long-backed cattle dogs standing from 16 to 21 inches at the shoulder. They have short, sturdy legs; a striking black, white, and tan coat; and an attentive, friendly face.
greater-swiss-mountain-dog: “███████” than what? Well, standing as high as 28.5 inches and weighing as much as a midsize human, a ███████ █████ might easily be ███████ than you.Swissies are immensely strong, yet agile enough to move a flock across the sloping foot of a ████████.
kuvasz: Imposing, impressive, majestic, massive, mighty—pick the adjective you like best, they all apply to the ██████ (pronounced KOO-vahz; the plural is Kuvaszok, pronounced KOO-vah-sock).
american-eskimo-dog: The ██████████████ comes in three sizes—standard, miniature, and toy—standing as tall as 19 inches at the shoulder or as short as 9 inches. Distinctive traits include a dense, sparkling white coat with a lion-like ruff around the chest and shoulders; a smiling face, with black nose, lips, and eye-rims that convey…
norwegian-buhund: The ██████, a prototypical spitz, provides a good opportunity to explain the term. Spitz are cold-weather breeds characterized by a dense coat, a tail curved tightly over the back, a wedge-shaped head, and erect, pointed ears (“spitz” means “pointed” in ancient German).
schipperke: Standing no higher than 13 inches, ██████████ are small dogs built for hard work. Schips were created as ratters and watchdogs. Their powerful jaws, necks, and forequarters—coupled with a stealthy, catlike hunting style—make them ideal rat-catching machines.
coton-de-tulear: The ██████████████ (KO-Tone Dih TOO-Lay-ARE) is a small, immensely charming dog standing between 9 and 11 inches high and weighing anywhere from 8 to 13 pounds.
brussels-griffon: With this breed, you get a big personality in a 5-to-15-pound package. One look into his big, human-like eyes, and you’ll be smitten. Griffs come in four colors—red, black-and-reddish-brown (called belge), black and tan, and black—and in smooth coats (like a Pug) or rough coats (like a Schnauzer).
